narrative:
Lafayette (precinct in Allen County) has 227 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
